description: Dr. Jiang Clinic was founded in Flushing with a simple mission: to provide accessible, high-quality Traditional Chinese Medicine care to the Goshen community.
What started as a small practice has grown into a trusted wellness center, helping over 1,000 patients achieve better health naturally.
clinic.environment: Our clinic provides a peaceful, welcoming environment designed to promote relaxation and healing. From the moment you enter, you'll feel the difference - calming colors, comfortable treatment rooms, and a warm, friendly atmosphere that puts patients at ease.

journey.story:
Kingsfoil Acupuncture was born from Dr. Jennifer Liang's deep belief that true healing happens when we address the whole person, not just symptoms. After completing her advanced TCM training in San Francisco and practicing for over 16 years, she felt called to bring authentic Chinese medicine to the beautiful Hudson Valley community of Goshen, where families could access time-tested healing traditions in a warm, welcoming environment.

Our clinic is named for the legendary healing herb, symbolizing nature's profound ability to restore balance and vitality. We honor the ancient wisdom of TCM while embracing each patient's unique journey toward wellness. Whether you're seeking relief from chronic pain, support for women's health concerns, or simply want to optimize your overall well-being, we meet you exactly where you are.

Every treatment at Kingsfoil is personalized to your individual constitution and health goals. We believe healing is a partnership between practitioner and patient, combining Dr. Liang's expertise with your body's innate wisdom to create lasting transformation and vibrant health.
journey.title: My Journey to Chinese Medicine

profile.bio:
Dr. Jennifer Liang has dedicated her life to mastering the art and science of Traditional Chinese Medicine. After earning her Master of Science in TCM (2012) and Doctor of TCM (2015) from the prestigious American College of Traditional Chinese Medicine in San Francisco, she became nationally board-certified through NCCAOM. Her 16 years of practice have been focused on helping patients discover their body's natural capacity for healing and balance.

Dr. Liang specializes in pain management and women's health, areas where TCM's holistic approach often provides profound relief where other methods have fallen short. She integrates multiple healing modalities—from precise acupuncture and custom herbal formulas to therapeutic cupping and nurturing tuina massage—creating treatment plans as unique as each patient. Her ability to communicate in both English and Chinese allows her to serve diverse communities with cultural sensitivity and understanding.

What sets Dr. Liang apart is her genuine compassion and ability to listen deeply to what each patient's body is communicating. She views symptoms not as isolated problems but as messages from the body about underlying imbalances in qi and organ systems. Her gentle yet effective approach has helped countless patients reclaim their vitality, find freedom from chronic conditions, and discover a more harmonious relationship with their health.
profile.name: Dr. Jennifer Liang
profile.quote: True healing begins when we listen to the wisdom your body has been trying to share with you all along.
profile.title: L.Ac

philosophy.title: Treatment Philosophy

principles.title: Treat the Whole Person
principles.description: TCM recognizes that physical symptoms are often connected to emotional, mental, and spiritual factors. Dr. Jennifer Liang addresses all aspects of health, not just isolated symptoms.

principles.title: Find the Root Cause
principles.description: Rather than merely suppressing symptoms, treatment focuses on identifying and addressing the underlying imbalances that create disease. This approach leads to lasting results.

principles.title: Personalized Care
principles.description: No two patients are alike. Each treatment plan is carefully customized based on your unique constitution, health history, and current condition.

principles.title: Patient Education
principles.description: Understanding your body and condition empowers you to take an active role in your healing. Dr. Jiang takes time to explain your diagnosis and treatment in clear, accessible terms.

principles.title: Integration with Western Medicine
principles.description: TCM can work beautifully alongside conventional medical care. Dr. Jennifer Liang collaborates with other healthcare providers to ensure comprehensive, coordinated treatment.

principles.title: Prevention & Wellness
principles.description: The best medicine prevents illness before it occurs. Treatment includes guidance on diet, lifestyle, and self-care practices to maintain long-term health.

philosophy.introduction: Dr. Jiang's approach to healing is rooted in the fundamental principles of Traditional Chinese Medicine while incorporating modern clinical understanding.

specializations.title: Areas of Specialization
specializations.description: Through years of clinical practice and continuing education, Dr. Jiang has developed particular expertise in several key areas:

items: Classical Chinese Herbal Medicine seminars with Dr. Heiner Fruehauf
Annual attendance at national TCM conferences
Regular study groups with local TCM practitioners
30+ hours of continuing education annually (required: 30 hours every 3 years)

continuingEducation.description: Dr. Jiang maintains active involvement in the TCM community and regularly pursues advanced training:
